name: Thermaltake S500 Tempered Glass ATX Mid-Tower Computer Case - Black - 140mm Front Fan - 120mm Rear Fan - Rotational PCI-E Slots - Built-in Riser GPU Support Bracket - 2x USB 3.0 - 2x USB 2.0 - HD Audio (CA-1O3-00M1WN-01)
shortName: Thermaltake S500 Tempered Glass ATX Mid-Tower Computer Case - Black
description: A mid-tower ATX case with tempered glass and built-in GPU support bracket, featuring rotational PCI-E slots for flexible configurations.
